---
title: "CV"
author: "Jane Q. Researcher"
jobtitle: ""
address: "Department of Economics, Example University, Example City, Country"
email: "jane.researcher@example.edu"
github: "janeresearcher"
web: "janeresearcher.example.org"
orcid: "0000-0000-0000-0000"
fontawesome: true
updated: true
keywords:
  - academic CV
  - Quarto
  - LaTeX

format:
  qkit-pdf: default
---

# Education

::: {.cv-entries}
- 2022 - Current | **Department of Economics**, Example University, Country, Ph.D. in Economics
- 2017 - 2019 | **Department of Economics**, Other University, Country, M.Sc. in Finance
- 2012 - 2017 | **Department of Economics**, Other University, Country, B.A. in Economics
:::

# Publications

::: {.cv-publications}
1. A Recent Study on Asset Prices and Macroeconomic Conditions, 2026, with A. Coauthor and B. Coauthor. **Top Finance Journal**, vol. 1, p. 1-50. [Link](https://example.org/paper1)
2. Forecasting Volatility with Machine Learning Methods, 2025, with A. Coauthor. **Journal of Applied Forecasting**, vol. 44, p. 100-150. [Link](https://example.org/paper2)
3. Time-Varying Risk and International Equity Markets, 2025, with C. Coauthor and B. Coauthor. **Journal of International Finance**, vol. 75, p. 200-230. [Link](https://example.org/paper3)
4. Predictability of Equity Returns, 2024, with A. Coauthor. **Journal of Empirical Finance**, vol. 94, p. 300-330. [Link](https://example.org/paper4)
5. Commodity Risk Premia Estimation with Machine Learning, 2023, with A. Coauthor and B. Coauthor. **Journal of Commodity Markets**, vol. 31, p. 400-420. [Link](https://example.org/paper5)
6. Economic Drivers of Industrial-Metal Volatility, 2021, with A. Coauthor. **Resources Policy**, vol. 73, p. 500-525. [Link](https://example.org/paper6)
7. Forecasting Commodity Prices with Decision-Tree Learning, 2020, with A. Coauthor and B. Coauthor. **Resources Policy**, vol. 69, p. 600-625. [Link](https://example.org/paper7)
:::

# Working Papers

::: {.cv-publications}
1. Strategic Timing of Voluntary Disclosure: Evidence from Investor Days, 2026, with D. Coauthor and E. Coauthor.
2. Disclosure Events as Trading Signals, 2026, with D. Coauthor and E. Coauthor. Available at [SSRN](https://example.org/ssrn).
:::

# Work-in-Progress

::: {.cv-publications}
1. Price Discovery Around Voluntary Disclosure Events, with D. Coauthor and E. Coauthor.
2. Adaptive Learning in Dynamic Portfolio Choice.
3. Early Disclosure and Learning in Innovation, with F. Coauthor.
4. Confidence Intervals in Stock Return Predictive Regressions, with A. Coauthor and B. Coauthor.
:::

# Statistical Software Packages

::: {.cv-publications}
1. firstpackage: One-line Description of What It Does, 2026. *R package version 0.1.0*. [Link](https://example.org/firstpackage)
2. secondpackage: One-line Description of What It Does, 2026. *R package version 0.1.0*. [Link](https://example.org/secondpackage)
:::

# Conferences and Workshops

- Conference A (City, 2026), Conference B (City, 2026), Conference C (City, 2026), Ph.D. Workshop (City, 2026), Workshop D (City, 2026), Workshop E (City, 2026), Joint Ph.D. Workshop (City, 2025), Conference F (City, 2024), Conference G (City, 2024), Conference H (City, 2024), Workshop I* (City, 2024), Workshop J (City, 2024), Doctoral Conference (City, 2023), Joint Ph.D. Workshop (City, 2023), Forecasting Symposium* (City, 2022), Empirical Finance Symposium* (City, 2022), Econometrics Conference* (Online, 2022), Banking Symposium* (Online, 2021), Applied Econometrics* (City, 2021), Annual Meeting* (Virtual, 2020), and Finance Conference* (City, 2019).
- \hspace{1em} *\textit{Presentations by co-authors}

# Research Experience

- **Visiting Department**, Other University, Country

  ::: {.cv-entries gap="2.5pt"}
  - 2025 - Current | Visiting Researcher
  :::

- **Department of Economics**, Example University, Country

  ::: {.cv-entries gap="2.5pt"}
  - 2022 - Current | Postgraduate Researcher
  :::

- **Department of Economics**, Earlier University, Country

  ::: {.cv-entries gap="2.5pt"}
  - 2017 - 2022 | Research Assistant
  :::

# Teaching Experience

- **Undergraduate** \textbf{\small as Teaching Assistant}

  ::: {.cv-entries gap="2.5pt"}
  - Fall 2025 | **Quantitative Methods**, Example University, Country
  - Spring 2025/26 | **Investment Analysis**, Example University, Country
  - Fall 2024/25 | **Financial Derivatives**, Example University, Country
  :::

- **Undergraduate** \textbf{\small as Lecturer}

  ::: {.cv-entries gap="2.5pt"}
  - Fall 2020 | **Data Management Applications**, Earlier University, Country
  :::

- **Graduate** \textbf{\small as Lecturer}

  ::: {.cv-entries gap="2.5pt"}
  - Fall 2022 | **Business Intelligence for Finance**, Earlier University, Country
  - Spring 2021 | **Python and R for Beginners**, Joint Certificate Program
  - Fall 2021/22 | **Introduction to Python for Finance**, Earlier University, Country
  - Spring 2020 | **Business Intelligence for Finance**, Earlier University, Country
  :::

# Grants and Scholarships

::: {.cv-entries}
- 2022 - Current | Example University Ph.D. Scholarship.
:::

# Other Academic Services

::: {.cv-keys}
- Referee | Journal A, Journal B, Journal C, and Journal D.
:::

# Languages

::: {.cv-keys}
- Spanish | Native
- English | Fluent
:::

# Research Interests

Voluntary Disclosure in Financial Markets, Empirical Asset Pricing, Forecasting, Machine Learning, Applied Time-Series Econometrics, and Textual Analysis in Finance.

# References

::: {.cv-references}
::: {.referee}
**[Referee One, Ph.D.](https://example.org/referee-one)**\
Department of Accounting and Finance\
School of Management\
Some University\
Some Address, Country\
\Letter\ [r.one@example.org](mailto:r.one@example.org)
:::

::: {.referee}
**[Referee Two, Ph.D.](https://example.org/referee-two)**\
Accounting and Finance Division\
Example Business School\
Example University\
Some Address, Country\
\Letter\ [r.two@example.org](mailto:r.two@example.org)
:::
:::

::: {.cv-references}
::: {.referee}
**[Referee Three, Ph.D.](https://example.org/referee-three)**\
Department of Business Administration\
Faculty of Economics and Business\
Earlier University\
Some Address, Country\
\Letter\ [r.three@example.org](mailto:r.three@example.org)
:::

::: {.referee}
**[Referee Four, Ph.D.](https://example.org/referee-four)**\
Department of Business Administration\
Faculty of Economics and Business\
Earlier University\
Some Address, Country\
\Letter\ [r.four@example.org](mailto:r.four@example.org)
:::
:::

# Other

::: {.cv-keys}
- Nationality | Your Nationality
:::
